rationale: The citing paper explicitly says it "extends dynamic targeted-advertising research" using cross-period purchase-funnel states and targeted vs. untargeted repeat ads, which aligns closely with the cited paper’s core focus on when dynamic retargeting works across a multistage decision process. Given this strong conceptual overlap (retargeting effectiveness contingent on decision stage/information specificity), the citation is plausibly foundational or comparative rather than a generic mention.
